turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello, uh, is this Sunrise Multispeciality Clinic?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes, good morning! You've reached Sunrise Multispeciality Clinic, Pune. How may I assist you today?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Haan, so I need to, umm, fix an appointment. My name is Priya Deshmukh. I've been having some chest pain for the last few days and I want to see a cardiologist.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Of course, Ms. Deshmukh. We have Dr. Ramesh Kulkarni available in cardiology. He has slots on Thursday at 11 AM and Friday at 3 PM. Which would work for you?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Thursday 11 AM should be fine, actually yes, Thursday works.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Perfect. Can I get your contact number and date of birth for registration?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Sure, it's 9823045671, and DOB is 14th March 1985.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you. Your appointment with Dr. Kulkarni is confirmed for this Thursday at 11 AM. Please arrive 15 minutes early and bring any previous reports. You'll receive an SMS confirmation shortly.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: You're welcome, Ms. Deshmukh. Take care and have a good day!
